title: helichrysum arenarium subsp. erzincanicum
intro: Helichrysum arenarium subsp. erzincanicum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), also known as a type of yellow-flowered, woody perennial herb. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Helichrysum arenarium subsp. erzincanicum are said to include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
